2.q: GLY I catalyses the isomerization of this HTA into S-D-lactoyl-glutathione (SLG)... we generated transgenic rice plants overexpressing the entire two-step glyoxalase pathway for MG detoxiﬁcation.
The glyoxalase detoxifying system consists of two enzymes, glyoxalase I and glyoxalase II (GlyI; GlyII)... GlyI converts hemithioacetal formed from GSH and methylglyoxal (MG) into SLG
The excess production of MG can be checked by the glyoxalase system ubiquitously present in living organisms, comprising glyoxalase I (gly I) and glyoxalase II (gly II)
Gly I isomerizes the hemithioacetal formed non-enzymatically from MG and GSH, forming S-D-lactoylglutathione

6.q: Both the vector pairs harbouring BjSOS3 and BjSOS2, in fusion with either N or C-terminal YFP showed strong fluorescence throughout the cytoplasm indicating a positive interaction between these proteins in vivo.

7.q: both the vector pairs harbouring BjSOS3 and BjSOS2, in fusion with either N or C-terminal YFP showed strong fluorescence throughout the cytoplasm indicating a positive interaction between these proteins in vivo. These results confirm the physical interaction between BjSOS2 and BjSOS3 proteins.

8.q: two stress-responsive genes BjuAPX1d and BraAAPX2 were cloned, characterized... APX enzyme assay was performed using recombinant purified proteins to validate their functional roles.
